---
applyTo: "js/**"
---

# JavaScript Instructions

When writing JavaScript for this project:
- All functions must have JSDoc comments with @param and @returns
- Use early returns to reduce nesting
- DOM queries should be cached in variables if used more than once
- Event listeners should be added in the DOMContentLoaded handler
- Use `Date.now().toString()` for generating unique IDs
- Always call `renderTodos()` after any state change
